title: use shared tags for images registry
body:
i wanted help to know how can i set a reference from a tag ( like `latest` ) to another tag in registry ?

something like `shared tags` in docker hub

comments.body:
Thanks for reaching out.

Could you be more precise about what are the inputs and outputs / actions that you want? Looking for “shared tags” gets me to https://github.com/docker-library/faq?tab=readme-ov-file#whats-the-difference-between-shared-and-simple-tags, and I don’t understand which part of that you want.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
